message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_wchar for CVE-class wide-character surface

## FULL REVIEW MODE verification

cargo test --workspace --all-targets this turn: only bd-9hq64
still failing, unchanged. No new regressions, no SIGABRTs. clippy
--workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean.

## New fuzz target — wchar CVE-class surface

Wide-character handling is an underfuzzed CVE class that was NOT
in the original bd-dvr22 priority enumeration but scores as high
as socket on historical CVE density: CVE-2014-6040 (iconv_open
wcharset OOB), CVE-2016-3075 (wmemchr overread), the wcsnrtombs
length-miscount family.

crates/frankenlibc-fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_wchar.rs covers the
172-symbol wchar_abi surface via 15 op variants:

- wcslen / wcsncpy / wcscat / wcsncat / wcscmp / wcsncmp / wcschr
- wcsspn / wcscspn / wcsdup
- mbtowc / wctomb round-trip (ASCII must round-trip exactly)
- btowc / wctob round-trip (ASCII must round-trip exactly)
- mbstowcs / wcstombs (bounded)

Invariants:
- 64-byte 0xFD guard sentinels on BOTH sides of every writable
  wide-char destination (16 u32s × 4 bytes per side), asserted
  intact after every call. Catches any off-by-one u32 write.
- wcslen(s) must equal the index of the first u32==0 in s.
- wcscpy / wcsncpy / wcscat / wcsncat must NUL-terminate when
  bounded correctly.
- ASCII round-trip exactness for mbtowc/wctomb and btowc/wctob
  (for every c < 128 the round-trip must yield the original).
- Input wide strings never contain embedded NULs (embedded NULs
  in the middle would be UB for most wchar ops; mapped to 1 at
  construction time via make_wide).

Safety:
- Input / output lengths bounded to MAX_LEN=256 u32s (~1 KiB
  wide-char strings + 64 B guards on each side).
- wcsdup result explicitly libc::free'd so the per-iteration
  leak is bounded. The ABI vs libc allocator question is a known
  CVE vector — if wcsdup routes through libc malloc (as the
  glibc wrapper does) then libc::free is correct.

Validation: cargo build + cargo clippy --no-deps -- -D warnings
clean after one unused-parens fix.

Agent: cc-libc
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,6 +120,11 @@ name = "fuzz_c11threads"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_c11threads.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_wchar"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_wchar.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [[bin]]
 name = "fuzz_resolver"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolver.rs"
